$comment: LOCAL-DEV comparison config. Runs the local working-tree adeu MCP servers (Node + Python) side-by-side against their published versions and safe-docx. Use with:  npm run benchmark -- --tools benchmark.tools.local.json  (or set BENCHMARK_TOOLS). Prerequisites: (1) the adeu repo checked out as a SIBLING of this repo (../adeu); (2) the Node server built — `cd ../adeu/node && npm run build`; (3) `uv` on PATH for the Python entries. Relative paths resolve against this repo's root (the MCP child inherits the benchmark's cwd). Verify everything launches without spending API quota:  npm run tools:check -- --tools benchmark.tools.local.json
